title: Marketing calendar 2026
bodyHtml:
We're now sharing our marketing calendar with you in advance.

 

This visibility into our planned campaigns, key trading moments, and promotional periods helps you plan strategically and maximize your success on our platform.

 

How this benefits you

Having advanced insight into our marketing activities enables you to move from reactive to proactive planning.

 

Here's what you can do with this information:

  1. Align inventory with demand
  2. Anticipate peak periods and ensure you have the right stock levels to avoid missed sales opportunities.
  3. Prepare for promotions in advance
  4. Get your products, pricing, and offers ready ahead of key moments so you can participate fully in campaigns.
  5. Improve Your Forecasting
  6. Sync your internal timelines with ours to make more accurate predictions and achieve better performance outcomes.

What this means for our partnership

Better collaboration starts with shared visibility. When we plan together, we can deliver stronger results, improved customer experiences, and mutual growth. This calendar is designed to create more opportunities for alignment and success.

 

Next steps

  1. Review the marketing calendar
  2. Identify opportunities where alignment can drive value for your brand
  3. Reach out to the SSC to discuss specific campaigns or ask questions
